description: Our two SD-WAN internet circuits have been logically upgraded by the ISP. The physical handoffs remain 10 Gbps, but the contracted bandwidth (CIR) has been increased to 2.5 Gbps (2500 Mbps). A ticket detailing the required changes is located at ~/Desktop/circuit_upgrade_ticket.txt. Add the local gateway (127.0.0.1) to OpManager using the default 'public' SNMP credential. Locate the two new WAN interfaces (wan-circ-01 and wan-circ-02), override their physical port speeds (In Speed and Out Speed) to exactly 2500 Mbps (2.5 Gbps), and apply strict bandwidth utilization alerts for both interfaces: Rx Traffic (Inbound) Warning at 85%, Rx Critical at 95%, Tx Traffic (Outbound) Warning at 85%, Tx Critical at 95%. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
